name: RENASANT CORP
summary: PART I General Renasant Corporation, a Mississippi corporation incorporated in 1982. It owns and operates Renasant Bank, a Mississippi banking corporation with operations throughout the Southeast, and also owns and operates Park Place Capital Corporation, a Tennessee corporation and registered investment advisor with operations across our footprint. Renasant Bank, in turn, owns and operates Continental Republic Capital, LLC (doing business as Republic Business Credit), a Louisiana limited liabil...
